overview: This small tree frog resembles a Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii) or similar Scinax species, characterized by its pointed snout and slender body. It has smooth, olive-green to bronze skin, which helps it blend in with its arboreal environment. Tree frogs in this family, Hylidae, are typically nocturnal, using large toe pads to climb branches and leaves. iNaturalist +2 3 sites Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii) · iNaturalist May 12, 2026 — Hay's Snouted Tree Frog (Scinax hayii) · iNaturalist.
